title: fix economics dashboard 403s with scoped tinybird read tokens
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tinybird tokens tamed
gist.blurb: Fixed a pesky 403 error on our internal economics dashboard by swapping out some Tinybird read tokens. The charts are flowing again!
gist.summary: Resolved 403 errors on the Grafana economics dashboard by implementing scoped per-datasource read tokens for Tinybird's ClickHouse protocol.
gist.impact: Internal dashboards now correctly display economics and generation metrics without authentication errors.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot fixing a broken chart or dashboard. A tiny pixel bird (Tinybird reference) sitting nearby helping out. Focus on observability and metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, fixing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) line chart on a retro computer monitor. A small pixelated bird sits happily on top of the monitor. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
